article_title: Will Trump Accounts deliver for American children?

tasks.prompt: What question does the article mainly examine?
options: Whether Trump Accounts will meaningfully help American children build savings
Whether the US will abolish all child savings accounts
Whether children should be paid wages by schools
Whether banks will stop offering retirement accounts
tasks.correct_answer: Whether Trump Accounts will meaningfully help American children build savings
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הכתבה בוחנת אם התוכנית החדשה באמת תועיל לילדים בארה״ב.

tasks.prompt: What initial government contribution is associated with qualifying babies?
tasks.explanation_hebrew: אחד מפרטי המפתח הוא מענק התחלתי של 1,000 דולר לתינוקות זכאים.

tasks.prompt: Which children are described as qualifying for the initial contribution?
options: Babies born in specified qualifying years
Only children already working full time
Only children living outside the US
tasks.correct_answer: Babies born in specified qualifying years
tasks.explanation_hebrew: התוכנית מכוונת לתינוקות שנולדו בשנים/בתנאים המזכים.

tasks.prompt: Why are some sceptics worried that lower-income families could lose out?
options: Families with less spare money may be less able to add contributions over time
Lower-income families are banned from opening accounts
The accounts can only buy luxury goods
The government contribution is paid only to millionaires
tasks.correct_answer: Families with less spare money may be less able to add contributions over time
tasks.explanation_hebrew: החשש הוא שהטבה המבוססת על חיסכון והשקעה תועיל יותר למי שיכול להוסיף כסף.

tasks.prompt: How does the White House framing differ from the concerns raised by critics? Answer in 3–6 sentences.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: White House presents the accounts as a stake in the American dream
Critics focus on unequal ability to contribute and benefit
Answer contrasts optimistic rhetoric with practical distributional concerns
Mentions savings, investment exposure, or lower-income families

tasks.prompt: Describe two rules or limits connected to the accounts, such as contributions or withdrawals. Answer in 3–6 sentences.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: Parents or others can contribute money
Withdrawals are limited or can face tax/penalties if early
Money may be directed toward uses such as education, expenses, or retirement
The details make the scheme more complicated than a simple cash gift

tasks.prompt: Why does the article compare the scheme with traditional savings or investment accounts?
options: To judge whether the new accounts add something useful beyond existing options
To argue that children should never invest
To show that all families already have identical savings habits
To explain why banks cannot hold children’s money
tasks.correct_answer: To judge whether the new accounts add something useful beyond existing options
tasks.explanation_hebrew: ההשוואה עוזרת לבחון אם מדובר בחידוש משמעותי או בעיקר במיתוג של כלי חיסכון מוכר.

tasks.prompt: Write a 120–170 word summary of the article without copying sentences.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: Explains what Trump Accounts are
Includes the $1,000 contribution and qualifying children
Mentions possible extra contributions and investment growth
Presents both supporters’ hopes and critics’ concerns
Discusses unequal benefits, complexity, or limits on withdrawals

tasks.prompt: What kinds of evidence would help determine whether Trump Accounts succeed over time? Answer in 3–6 sentences.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: Participation rates across income groups
Average contributions beyond the initial subsidy
Long-term account balances and investment outcomes
How often withdrawals are used for education, expenses, or retirement
Whether the programme narrows or widens wealth gaps

tasks.prompt: Write a 3–6 sentence evaluation of one likely consequence of the scheme for American children.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: States a clear judgment or likely consequence
Uses article details such as subsidy, eligibility, contributions, penalties, or inequality
Acknowledges at least one limitation or counterargument
